description: This file contains SCSS styles for button components, including base styles, variants, link styles, and size modifiers. It uses SCSS features like variables, mixins, loops, and conditionals to generate CSS for buttons with customizable themes and states.
external_files: variables and mixins referenced within the file (e.g., rfs, font-size, border-radius, gradient-bg, box-shadow, transition, button-variant, button-outline-variant, shade-color, tint-color)
